title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
